title: rupicapnos longipes subsp. reboudiana
intro: Rupicapnos longipes subsp. reboudiana, also known as Rebour's hornsed poppy, is a perennial plant species found in the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sedation and reduce anxiety, which is attributed to its alkaloid content, including berberine and protopine. The health benefits of Rupicapnos longipes subsp. reboudiana include its use as a natural remedy for insomnia, restlessness, and digestive issues, due to its soothing and anti-inflammatory effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
